title: PsiMeter session.open payload
description: The payload of a session.open ledger entry (spec §9.4): the signed pre-commitment context recorded before generation. A verifier re-derives experimentHash from {experimentId, experimentVersion}, recomputes precommit/anchor from the PrecommitInput (§7), and checks operatorSig against operatorPubKey.

intention.description: The committed choice (§7 vocabulary). Per-trial kinds (precognition) commit the empty string at the session level (§11.2).
